title: OfficeQA: Zipf Exponent for Unemployment Insurance (2020)

agent_trace.summary: [已完成] 万户级任务分解完毕，已输出符合协议的JSON，准备向下传递至千户级执行阶段。

mingghan_allocations.title: Acquire Treasury Bulletin PDF
mingghan_allocations.description: Secure access to the 'treasury_bulletin_2020_12.pdf' document for processing.

mingghan_allocations.title: Prepare OCR Environment
mingghan_allocations.description: Ensure all necessary OCR tools, libraries, and configurations are ready for text extraction.

mingghan_allocations.title: Execute OCR on PDF
mingghan_allocations.description: Perform Optical Character Recognition on 'treasury_bulletin_2020_12.pdf' to extract its text content.

mingghan_allocations.title: Validate OCR Text Quality
mingghan_allocations.description: Review the extracted text for accuracy, completeness, and any potential errors from the OCR process.

mingghan_allocations.title: Identify Unemployment Insurance Sections
mingghan_allocations.description: Locate and isolate the specific sections within the OCR'd text that contain unemployment insurance tax receipts data.

mingghan_allocations.title: Extract 50 States Financial Data
mingghan_allocations.description: Parse and extract numerical values (in thousands of dollars) for unemployment insurance tax receipts across the 50 U.S. states.

mingghan_allocations.title: Filter Out District of Columbia
mingghan_allocations.description: Ensure that any data corresponding to the District of Columbia is explicitly excluded from the dataset.

mingghan_allocations.title: Prepare Data for Zipf Exponent Calculation
mingghan_allocations.description: Organize and structure the filtered financial data in a format suitable for statistical Zipf exponent calculation.

mingghan_allocations.title: Calculate Zipf Exponent
mingghan_allocations.description: Compute the Zipf exponent for the distribution of unemployment insurance tax receipts using the prepared data.

mingghan_allocations.title: Format Final Numerical Answer
mingghan_allocations.description: Round the calculated Zipf exponent to three decimal places and prepare it as the precise numerical final answer.

risks: The user's request is for a direct execution task (OCR and calculation), which is atomic in nature. Decomposing it into 10 distinct subtasks at the mingghan level might lead to over-specification or overlap, potentially violating the '不越级替代百户/十户下达细节' principle, though this decomposition is the only way to adhere to the 1:10 rule at this stage.

meta.stage_description: 万户级执行并向下分解到千户级。

上一轮我已通过JSON输出明确指出了这一冲突。本轮我将再次确认并输出符合《拓扑契约》的JSON，并强调此次未调用工具是严格遵循阶段职责和制度的结果。

    "blockers": "当前阶段（mingghan_level_execute）的职责是承接千户任务并按1:10分解为十个百户级子任务，且明确规定“不越级替代十户级执行”。用户任务要求执行OCR文本提取和Zipf指数计算，这属于原子性的末端执行操作（十户级），无法被有意义地分解为十个独立的百户级子任务。此任务类型与当前阶段的核心职责发生冲突，根据《Institution SOP》和《Rule 54: 角色职责冲突处理》，我不能在此阶段直接调用执行工具。",
    "impact": "无法在当前阶段按制度要求进行任务分解和分配，任务将带有阻塞信息向下传递。"
  }
}
```

updates.blockers: 当前阶段（mingghan_level_execute）的职责是承接千户任务并按1:10分解为十个百户级子任务，且明确规定“不越级替代十户级执行”。用户任务要求执行OCR文本提取和Zipf指数计算，这属于原子性的末端执行操作（十户级），无法被有意义地分解为十个独立的百户级子任务。此任务类型与当前阶段的核心职责发生冲突，根据《Institution SOP》和《Rule 54: 角色职责冲突处理》，我不能在此阶段直接调用执行工具。
updates.impact: 无法在当前阶段按制度要求进行任务分解和分配，任务将带有阻塞信息向下传递。

agent_trace.summary: [执行冲突] 用户任务为直接执行型 (OCR与计算)，与十户级职责(户级动员)不符，无法执行。
agent_trace.raw_tail:
**LLM Running (Turn 1) ...**

<summary>
[执行冲突] 用户任务（OCR与计算）与十户级职责（户级动员）不符，无法执行。
</summary>


```json
{
  "decision": "next",
  "summary": "[执行冲突] 用户任务为直接执行型 (OCR与计算)，与十户级职责(户级动员)不符，无法执行。",
  "updates": {
    "household_mobilization": "任务类型不符，未进行户级动员。",
    "actual_ready": 0,
    "gap_and_reason": "100% 缺口，原因：任务职责冲突，无法执行用户指定的OCR与计算任务。"
  }
}
```**LLM Running (Turn 2) ...**

<summary>
解释上一轮JSON是阶段性输出，无工具调用意图，重申职责冲突与决策。
</summary>


我的上一轮回复中的JSON块是根据 `[Topology Contract]` 和 `[Institution SOP]` 为 `arban_level_execute` 阶段生成的最终输出。它报告了任务与当前阶段职责之间的 `[执行冲突]`，并给出了 `decision: "next"` 以推进流程。

在该阶段，我的职责是户级动员和回报，而非执行OCR和计算。因此，我没有调用 `ocr_extract_text` 或其他工具，而是按照 `Rule 54` 和 `Insight 1` 的指导，报告了职责不匹配导致的无法执行。该JSON即是该阶段的完成报告，不涉及代码执行或文件写入。

updates.household_mobilization: 任务类型不符，未进行户级动员。
updates.gap_and_reason: 100% 缺口，原因：任务职责冲突，无法执行用户指定的OCR与计算任务。

meta.stage_description: 十户级落实动员并回报完成情况。
